subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who hath turned unto God, that his remembrance may endure among the worlds. Say: Glory belongeth not unto those who turn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من اقبل الی الله لیبقی ذکره بین العالمین قل لیس الفخر للذین توجهوا
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the golden rule; regard for one's neighbor; doing unto others, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
